intro.title: Acme Analytics
intro.subtitle: Turn raw events into shareable reports

outro.title: Explore. Build. Share.
outro.subtitle: Everything you saw runs in the browser.

scenes.text: Acme Analytics turns a stream of raw events into clean, shareable reports. This is a short walkthrough of the core flow, from a new report to a finished export.
We start on the dashboard and create a new report. Everything runs in the browser, so there is nothing to install.
We give the report a title and choose a time window. The form is the only input the tool needs to get started.
This is the core of the product. From that small amount of input, it assembles a complete report and renders it to a finished document. You can watch it build.
Here is the finished report, opened just as a stakeholder would receive it. It reads like a real document, with a cover, sections, and charts, not a rough draft.
The live dashboard shows the same data updating in real time. Charts stream in as new events arrive, so the picture is always current.
Sharing is one step. We send the report to a teammate by email, and they get the same interactive view we just built.
Create a report, render it to a polished document, watch it live, and share it in one step. That is the core of Acme Analytics.
